name: aopab/moldable-dev
summary: Moldable development principles — programming through contextual micro tools built for each problem. Build domain-specific inspectors, reduce time-to-answer (ttA), use live data exploration, and create narrative-driven tools. Based on the 8 principles from moldabledevelopment.com. Triggers on "explore", "inspect", "debug", "investigate", "moldable", "inspector", "live data", "custom view", "understand code", "how does this work", "figure out", "narrative".
